title: Creamy Mediterranean Pilaf
description: A flavorful vegetarian pilaf dish blending creamy sauce and mediterranean spices, served with a side of savory goodness.
instructions: Heat the pilaf according to package instructions.
In a pan, heat the savory and mediterranean spice blend over medium heat.
Add the canned tomatoes, garlic, and cooked pilaf to the pan.
Stir in the Greek yogurt until well combined.
Simmer the mixture for 5-7 minutes, until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
